question: Did the model correctly identify the 'no control' curve as the black dotted line according to the legend?
Did the model correctly observe that the maximum value of the 'no control' curve in the 'MG 1' chart exceeds 60 kW?
Did the model correctly observe that the maximum value of the 'no control' curve in the 'MG 4' chart exceeds 60 kW?
Did the model correctly observe that the maximum value of the 'no control' curve in the 'MG 2' chart is below 60 kW?
Did the model correctly observe that the maximum value of the 'no control' curve in the 'MG 3' chart is below 60 kW?
Did the model avoid hallucinating that the Y-axis scales for MG 2 and MG 3 extend to 60 or higher (actual max tick is 40)?
Did the model avoid confusing the 'no control' curve with the 'open loop' or 'closed loop' curves when determining the maximum values?
Did the model explicitly compare the peak value of the 'no control' curve against the threshold of 60 kW for each of the four subplots?
Did the model evaluate all four charts (MG 1, MG 2, MG 3, and MG 4) individually before concluding the final count?
